audio.transcript: Today's AI engineering briefing. Item 1: Pressure Point: Realtime LLM for Games. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. No strong keyword match; defaulted to foundations. Read it through that lens. Item 2: Show HN: Mac App to turn your computer into a hands-off coding agent. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 3: Show HN: Termaxa – I found my AI-agent gate had silently stopped gating Cursor. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 4: Veta: AI agent that QA-tests Android apps. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 5: StepFun Unveils StepX Neo, the "First Agentic AI Phone". Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 6: Show HN: Democr.ai – self-hosted agentic AI runtime with audit and RBAC. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens.
